languages.text: "Я не ведал, что служу еретику! Я верен Богу-Императору!"

traits.locale_text: "Я не ведал, что служу еретику! Я верен Богу-Императору!"

languages.text: "I didn't know I was serving a heretic! I'm loyal to the God-Emperor!"
languages.original_text: "Я не ведал, что служу еретику! Я верен Богу-Императору!"

traits.locale_text: "I didn't know I was serving a heretic! I'm loyal to the God-Emperor!"
"I didn't know I was serving a heretic! I'm loyal to the God-Emperor!"
"I didn't know I was serving a heretic! I'm loyal to the God-Emperor!"

languages.text: "Ich wusste nicht, dass ich einem Ketzer diene! Ich bin dem Gottimperator treu ergeben!"
languages.original_text: "I didn't know I was serving a heretic! I'm loyal to the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich wusste nicht, dass ich einem Ketzer diene! Ich bin dem Gottimperator treu ergeben!"

languages.text: “我不知道我效忠的是异端！我对神皇忠心耿耿！”
languages.original_text: "I didn't know I was serving a heretic! I'm loyal to the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: “我不知道我效忠的是异端！我对神皇忠心耿耿！”

languages.text: « J'ignorais que j'étais au service d'un hérétique ! L'Empereur-Dieu a toute mon allégeance ! »
languages.original_text: "I didn't know I was serving a heretic! I'm loyal to the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: « J'ignorais que j'étais au service d'un hérétique ! L'Empereur-Dieu a toute mon allégeance ! »

languages.text: «¡Yo no sabía que estaba al servicio de un hereje! ¡Soy leal al Dios Emperador!».
languages.original_text: "I didn't know I was serving a heretic! I'm loyal to the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Yo no sabía que estaba al servicio de un hereje! ¡Soy leal al Dios Emperador!».

languages.text: "Bir kâfire hizmet ettiğimi bilmiyordum! Tanrı İmparator'a sadığım!"
languages.original_text: "I didn't know I was serving a heretic! I'm loyal to the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: "Bir kâfire hizmet ettiğimi bilmiyordum! Tanrı İmparator'a sadığım!"

languages.text: 「異端者を奉仕していたなんて知らなかった！私は神皇帝に忠実だ！」
languages.original_text: "I didn't know I was serving a heretic! I'm loyal to the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: 「異端者を奉仕していたなんて知らなかった！私は神皇帝に忠実だ！」
